summary: Implemented PRD US-013, US-014, and US-015 runtime integration.
impact: Click events now support petting, double-click jump, and right-click Electron menu.
MouseBridge starts drag only after a movement threshold so normal clicks do not trigger drag/fall first.
BehaviorScheduler now has default weights, cooldowns, interaction pause, and PetRuntime integration.
ConfigStore persists config.json in Electron userData and renderer behaviors read runtime config.

summary: Added sprite-first animation runtime and validation sprite frames.
impact: AnimationPlayer resolves PNG sprite clips before falling back to Lottie JSON.
Default sprite manifest bundles idle, happy, jump, drag, fall, and temporary walk clips through Vite imports.
The pet renderer now uses a transparent 96x168 sprite hit area with idle breathing applied to the full character image.
Sprite playback tests cover frame rendering, looping, non-looping completion, Lottie fallback, and late setLoop(false).
PetRuntime now records left/right walking direction from horizontal velocity.
Right-facing walk flips img.pet-sprite-frame with CSS scaleX(-1) without changing physics coordinates or the pet container transform.
Tests cover runtime direction state and the right-facing CSS rule.

summary: Generated a DockCat-compatible British Blue Shorthair action set.
impact: Created assets/british-blue-cat with 14 transparent PNG actions, manifest.json, preview_contact_sheet.png, and FEATURES.md.
The set was redrawn with the image generation tool from src/rawMT British Shorthair references and DefaultCat pose/style references.
Sprites use short-haired blue-gray British Shorthair traits rather than recoloring the original long-haired DefaultCat silhouette.

summary: Applied the British Blue Shorthair asset set to the sprite runtime.
impact: Default sprite assets now import from assets/british-blue-cat.
AnimationPlayer supports clipVariants so idle can choose a random resting pose on entry.
Drag now renders the generated held pose; walk uses the generated four-frame walk cycle.
The renderer hit area was updated to a square 140x140 container for the DockCat-style sprites.

summary: Swapped walk sprite mirroring for right-facing source art.
impact: British Blue Shorthair walk frames face right by default.
CSS now flips img.pet-sprite-frame only when data-direction=left.
PetRuntime direction semantics remain unchanged: positive horizontal velocity still writes data-direction=right.
